ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vcenters" (
  "vcenter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_info" TEXT /* Information about the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_type" TEXT /* Type of the vCenter server (e.g., VC, ESXi, Windows) */,
  "vcenter_api_version" TEXT /* API version of the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_phys_host_id" TEXT /* ID of the physical host associated with the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_proxy_services_creds" TEXT /* Credentials for proxy services used with the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_description" TEXT /* Description of the vCenter server */,
  "vcenter_is_unavailable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vCenter server is unavailable */,
  "vcenter_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vCenter server (e.g., UUID) */,
  "vcenter_datacenter" TEXT /* Datacenter where the vCenter server is located */,
  "vcenter_cluster" TEXT /* Cluster where the vCenter server is located */,
  "vcenter_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vCenter server (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vcenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "esxi_hosts" (
  "esxi_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ESXi host */,
  "vcenter_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent vCenter server */,
  "esxi_name" TEXT /* Name of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_info" TEXT /* Information about the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_type" TEXT /* Type of the ESXi host (e.g., ESXi, Windows) */,
  "esxi_api_version" TEXT /* API version of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_phys_host_id" TEXT /* ID of the physical host associated with the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_proxy_services_creds" TEXT /* Credentials for proxy services used with the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_description" TEXT /* Description of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_is_unavailable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ESXi host is unavailable */,
  "esxi_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the ESXi host (e.g., UUID) */,
  "esxi_cpu_info" TEXT /* Information about the CPU of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_memory_info" TEXT /* Information about the memory of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_storage_info" TEXT /* Information about the storage of the ESXi host */,
  "esxi_network_info" TEXT /* Information about the network of the ESXi host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("esxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_esxi_hosts_vcenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("vcenter_id") REFERENCES vcenters ("vcenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_esxi_hosts_esxi_phys_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("esxi_phys_host_id") REFERENCES physical_hosts ("phys_host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_hosts" (
  "phys_host_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the physical host */,
  "phys_host_name" TEXT /* Name of the physical host */,
  "phys_host_info" TEXT /* Information about the physical host */,
  "phys_host_description" TEXT /* Description of the physical host */,
  "phys_host_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the physical host (e.g., UUID) */,
  "phys_host_cpu_info" TEXT /* Information about the CPU of the physical host */,
  "phys_host_memory_info" TEXT /* Information about the memory of the physical host */,
  "phys_host_storage_info" TEXT /* Information about the storage of the physical host */,
  "phys_host_network_info" TEXT /* Information about the network of the physical host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phys_host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_machines" (
  "vm_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the virtual machine */,
  "esxi_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent ESXi host */,
  "vm_name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_info" TEXT /* Information about the virtual machine */,
  "vm_type" TEXT /* Type of the virtual machine (e.g., Windows) */,
  "vm_api_version" TEXT /* API version of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_phys_host_id" TEXT /* ID of the physical host associated with the virtual machine */,
  "vm_proxy_services_creds" TEXT /* Credentials for proxy services used with the virtual machine */,
  "vm_description" TEXT /* Description of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_is_unavailable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the virtual machine is unavailable */,
  "vm_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the virtual machine (e.g., UUID) */,
  "vm_cpu_info" TEXT /* Information about the CPU of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_memory_info" TEXT /* Information about the memory of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_storage_info" TEXT /* Information about the storage of the virtual machine */,
  "vm_network_info" TEXT /* Information about the network of the virtual machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_machines_vm_phys_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_phys_host_id") REFERENCES physical_hosts ("phys_host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_machines_esxi_id FOREIGN KEY ("esxi_id") REFERENCES esxi_hosts ("esxi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the accessed entity (vCenter, ESXi, or VM) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (vCenter, ESXi, or VM) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the entity */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the entity was accessed */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the entity was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES vcenters ("vcenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES esxi_hosts ("esxi_id")
)
